title: CI & Test Infrastructure: GitHub Actions + ExUnit Test Organization
description:
## Overview

Add GitHub Actions CI pipeline and organize ExUnit tests by tier (unit / integration / security) with proper tag-based exclusion.

## Context

- Approved via ralplan consensus (Planner → Architect → Critic loop, 3 iterations)
- telemetry_metrics upgraded 0.6 → 1.0 in same session
- Known constraint: Elixir 1.18.4 + telemetry_metrics 1.0 crashes Module.ParallelChecker; CI pins to 1.16.3

## Deliverables

### 1. test/test_helper.exs
Add `ExUnit.configure(exclude: [:integration, :security])` before `ExUnit.start()` so `mix test` runs only unit tests by default.

### 2. Makefile
New targets (all added to .PHONY):
- `fmt-check`: `mix format --check-formatted`
- `compile-check`: `mix compile --warnings-as-errors`
- `test-unit`: `mix test` (unit only, alias kept as `test:`)
- `test-integration`: `mix test --only integration`
- `test-security`: `mix test --only security` (covers test/security/ 8 files + 4 inline @tag :security in metrics_test.exs)
- `test-all`: `mix test --include integration --include security` (single VM boot)
- `credo`: `mix credo --strict`
- `dialyzer`: `mix dialyzer`
- `ci`: sequential fail-fast chain of all above

### 3. .github/workflows/ci.yml (new file)
- Global: MIX_ENV=test, Elixir 1.16.3, OTP 26.2.5, ubuntu-latest
- Jobs (DAG):
  - `fmt` — mix format --check-formatted (no deps.get needed)
  - `compile` — deps.get + mix compile --warnings-as-errors; caches deps/ and _build/
  - `test-unit` — needs: compile; actions/cache/restore; mix deps.get fallback; mix test
  - `test-integration` — needs: compile; mix test --only integration
  - `test-security` — needs: compile; mix test --only security (atom_exhaustion has 120s timeout, acceptable)
  - `credo` — needs: compile; mix credo --strict
  - `dialyzer` — needs: compile; separate PLT cache (ubuntu-plt-1.16.3-26.2.5-LOCK_HASH); mix dialyzer
  - `nix-smoke` — push-only, conditional on flake/mix.lock changes; cachix/install-nix-action; nix develop -c mix test

## Cache Keys
- deps: `${{ runner.os }}-deps-${{ hashFiles('mix.lock') }}`
- build: `${{ runner.os }}-build-test-${{ hashFiles('mix.lock') }}`
- PLT: `${{ runner.os }}-plt-${{ env.ELIXIR_VERSION }}-${{ env.OTP_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('mix.lock') }}`
- Fan-out jobs use actions/cache/restore (read-only) to avoid cache thrashing

## Known Issues / Constraints
- Elixir 1.18.4 + telemetry_metrics 1.0/1.1 crashes mix compile (Module.ParallelChecker beam_lib atom bug); CI uses 1.16.3 to avoid this
- nix-smoke uses paths filter pattern — implement with dorny/paths-filter for PR support
- @tag :security in metrics_test.exs (lines 398/423/434/445): excluded from unit run, included in --only security (correct)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 7 primary CI jobs green on clean push
- [ ] `make ci` exits 0 in nix develop shell
- [ ] `mix test --only integration` passes with mock OTLP server only (no external services)
- [ ] PR contains: .github/workflows/ci.yml + Makefile + test/test_helper.exs

title: Update test_helper.exs: exclude integration+security tags by default
description: Add `ExUnit.configure(exclude: [:integration, :security])` before `ExUnit.start()` in test/test_helper.exs. Keep existing Code.require_file line. This makes `mix test` unit-only by default.

title: Makefile: add fmt-check, compile-check, test-unit/integration/security, credo, dialyzer, test-all, ci targets
description: Add all new targets to .PHONY. Exact commands per plan. Keep existing `test:` as alias for `test-unit` for backward compat. Update `test-all` to run `mix test --include integration --include security` (drops old docs dependency).

title: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml with 7-job DAG
description: New file. MIX_ENV=test globally. Elixir 1.16.3 + OTP 26.2.5. Jobs: fmt, compile (read-write cache), test-unit/integration/security/credo (read-only cache, mix deps.get fallback), dialyzer (PLT cache), nix-smoke (conditional). See epic for exact cache keys.

title: Implement observlib_ex: Feature-complete Elixir reimplementation
description:
# Implementation Plan for observlib_ex

Complete Elixir reimplementation of the Python observlib library with OpenTelemetry integration.

## Overview
Reimplementation using idiomatic Elixir patterns: OTP applications, supervision trees, Telemetry integration, and compile-time macros.

## Reference Documentation
- Python Analysis: ../observlib/observlib/CLAUDE.md
- Architecture Design: ../.omc/observlib-ex-architecture.md
- Implementation Plan: ../.omc/observlib-ex-implementation-plan.md

## Implementation Phases

### Phase 1: Core Infrastructure (4h - LOW)
- [ ] ObservLib main module with public API
- [ ] ObservLib.Application - OTP application
- [ ] ObservLib.Config - Configuration GenServer
- Files: lib/observlib.ex, lib/observlib/application.ex, lib/observlib/config.ex
- Tests: test/observlib_test.exs, test/observlib/config_test.exs

### Phase 2: Telemetry Foundation (2h - LOW)
- [ ] ObservLib.Telemetry - Event handler attachment
- File: lib/observlib/telemetry.ex
- Test: test/observlib/telemetry_test.exs

### Phase 3: Traces Module (8h - MEDIUM)
- [ ] ObservLib.Traces.Supervisor - Supervision tree
- [ ] ObservLib.Traces.Provider - Span management GenServer
- [ ] ObservLib.Traces.OTLPExporter - OTLP HTTP exporter
- [ ] ObservLib.Traces.PyroscopeProcessor - Pyroscope integration
- Files: lib/observlib/traces/*.ex
- Tests: test/observlib/traces/*_test.exs

### Phase 4: Metrics Module (10h - MEDIUM-HIGH)
- [ ] ObservLib.Metrics.Supervisor - Supervision tree
- [ ] ObservLib.Metrics.MeterProvider - Metric collection GenServer
- [ ] ObservLib.Metrics.PrometheusReader - Prometheus scrape endpoint
- [ ] ObservLib.Metrics.OTLPExporter - OTLP HTTP exporter
- Files: lib/observlib/metrics/*.ex
- Tests: test/observlib/metrics/*_test.exs

### Phase 5: Logs Module (6h - MEDIUM)
- [ ] ObservLib.Logs.Supervisor - Supervision tree
- [ ] ObservLib.Logs.Backend - Logger backend (:gen_event)
- [ ] ObservLib.Logs.OTLPExporter - OTLP HTTP exporter
- Files: lib/observlib/logs/*.ex
- Tests: test/observlib/logs/*_test.exs

### Phase 6: Traced Macro (12h - HIGH)
- [ ] ObservLib.Traced - Macro for function decoration
- File: lib/observlib/traced.ex
- Test: test/observlib/traced_test.exs
- Note: Complex macro metaprogramming + AST manipulation

### Phase 7: Pyroscope Integration (4h - MEDIUM)
- [ ] ObservLib.Pyroscope.Client - Pyroscope HTTP client
- File: lib/observlib/pyroscope/client.ex
- Test: test/observlib/pyroscope/client_test.exs

### Phase 8: Integration & End-to-End Tests (6h - MEDIUM)
- [ ] Full telemetry pipeline tests
- [ ] OTLP export to mock server
- [ ] Prometheus scraping tests
- Files: test/integration/*.exs

### Phase 9: Documentation & Examples (4h - LOW)
- [ ] README.md usage guide
- [ ] Getting started guide
- [ ] Configuration guide
- [ ] Custom instrumentation guide
- [ ] Example scripts
- Files: guides/*.md, examples/*.exs

## Dependencies

### Runtime
- opentelemetry_api (~> 1.2)
- opentelemetry (~> 1.3)
- opentelemetry_exporter (~> 1.6)
- opentelemetry_telemetry (~> 1.0)
- telemetry (~> 1.2)
- telemetry_metrics (~> 0.6)
- telemetry_poller (~> 1.0)
- jason (~> 1.4)
- req (~> 0.4)

### Dev/Test
- ex_doc (~> 0.30)
- dialyxir (~> 1.4)
- credo (~> 1.7)
- stream_data (~> 0.6)

## Success Criteria
- [ ] All Python observlib features implemented
- [ ] OTLP export working (traces, metrics, logs)
- [ ] Prometheus metrics endpoint functional
- [ ] Pyroscope profiling integration working
- [ ] Test coverage >90%
- [ ] All Dialyzer warnings resolved
- [ ] Credo checks pass
- [ ] Documentation complete
- [ ] Examples run successfully

## Total Estimate
~57 hours across 9 phases

## Notes
- Phase 0 (Project Setup) already complete
- Project already initialized in observlib_ex/
- Follow idiomatic Elixir patterns throughout
- Use supervision trees for fault tolerance
- Leverage Telemetry for events
